title: March 16th, 2022
body:
lyrics




flow = balance / time

balance = a sense of present access to embodied potential

flow seeking motivates environment mastery

modern market-focused games stimulate pseudo-flow by creating dynamic environments that remove friction between intention and action rather than cultivating rich environments that reward overcoming friction all while compulsively lampshading and/or hiding their own fingerprints and failing to critically self-examine the broader impact of replacing deeply internal flow experiences with infinitely more commodifiable pseudo-flow

games allow for virtual spaces to be habituated to by engaged players
